description: The Bonavota 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Sant'Onofrio and Stefanaconi, Calabria, Italy. Founded in the 1980s, it is involved in extortion, loan sharking, drug trafficking, and money laundering. The clan has expanded to Piedmont, Rome, Toronto, and Geneva. It is allied with the Anello, Lo Bianco, and Mancuso 'ndrine.

country_links.evidence_quote: The 'ndrina is present also in Toronto , Canada
country_links.context: The Bonavota 'ndrina has a presence in Toronto, Canada.

country_links.evidence_quote: is known to laundering much of their profits from drug trafficking in Geneva , Switzerland
country_links.context: The Bonavota 'ndrina launders much of their profits from drug trafficking in Geneva, Switzerland.
